mapper.select: SELECT t.* FROM tb_ppe_performance t WHERE t.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY t.evaluation_date DESC, t.id DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_performance WHERE is_deleted = 0
SELECT t.* FROM tb_ppe_performance t WHERE t.is_deleted = 0 AND t.result = #{result} ORDER BY t.evaluation_date DESC, t.id DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_performance WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND result = #{result}

SELECT t.* FROM tb_ppe_performance t WHERE t.is_deleted = 0 AND (t.item_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR t.performance_standard LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR t.evaluator LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%') ORDER BY t.evaluation_date DESC, t.id DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_performance WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND (item_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR performance_standard LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR evaluator LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%')
SELECT t.* FROM tb_ppe_performance t WHERE t.id = #{id} AND t.is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_ppe_performance ( evaluation_date, item_id, item_name, performance_standard, standard_value, measured_value, result, evaluator, note, created_by, modified_by, created_at, modified_at, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{evaluationDate}, #{itemId}, #{itemName}, #{performanceStandard}, #{standardValue}, #{measuredValue}, #{result}, #{evaluator}, #{note}, #{createdBy,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, #{modifiedBy,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, SYSDATETIME(), SYSDATETIME(), 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_ppe_performance SET evaluation_date = #{evaluationDate}, item_id = #{itemId}, item_name = #{itemName}, performance_standard = #{performanceStandard}, standard_value = #{standardValue}, measured_value = #{measuredValue}, result = #{result}, evaluator = #{evaluator}, note = #{note}, modified_by = #{modifiedBy,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, modified_at = SYSDATETIME() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_ppe_performance SET is_deleted = 1, modified_at = SYSDATETIME() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_performance WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND result = 'MEET'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_performance WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND result = 'BELOW'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_performance WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND result = 'PENDING'
